topic: Google Jules AI Agent Review 2026: Async GitHub Coding Agent Tested

competitors.title: Jules: Google's autonomous AI coding agent
key_points: Google Jules launched Dec 2024 in Google Labs, entered public beta May 20, 2025
Autonomous coding agent (not co-pilot or sidekick) that reads code, understands intent, and works
Asynchronous agentic coding assistant that integrates directly with existing repositories
Clones codebase into secure Google Cloud VM, understands full project context
Performs tasks: writing tests, building new features, audio changelogs, fixing bugs, bumping dependencies
Uses Gemini 2.5 Pro for advanced coding reasoning paired with cloud VM system
Shows plan and reasoning before making changes, allows user steerability
Free during public beta, pricing expected after beta as platform matures

competitors.title: Best AI Coding Agents 2026 (Autonomous Coding)
key_points: AI assistants suggest code vs AI agents build autonomously creating files, writing code, running tests
Jules represents shift from AI assistants to true autonomous agents
Comparison matrix of 7 AI coding agents shows varying autonomy levels and pricing ($9.99-$500/mo)
Different agents specialized for different use cases: web dev, multi-file editing, enterprise, GitHub repos

stats.fact: Jules uses Gemini 2.5 Pro model for advanced coding reasoning
Currently in free public beta, pricing expected after beta completion
AI coding agents market includes 7 major players with prices ranging $9.99-$500/month
